Franchise Available – Srikakulam District

Pharma Franchise in Srikakulam, Andhra Pradesh

Take a PCD pharma franchise or work as a commission-based Medical Representative in Srikakulam with Crasenim Pharma. We are headquartered just 50 km away in Vizianagaram — meaning faster product supply, direct management support, and a well-recognised brand in your district.

📍 Srikakulam District 🏢 Exclusive Territory Rights 🏠 HQ 50 km away in Vizianagaram ✅ WHO GMP Certified Products
💬 Enquire via WhatsApp All Franchise Info
Opportunity

Why Srikakulam is a Smart Franchise Choice

Srikakulam is an underserved pharmaceutical market compared to metros like Visakhapatnam — which means less competition, easier territory establishment, and stronger relationships with local doctors who appreciate a personal, consistent presence from a franchise partner.

With Crasenim Pharma's Vizianagaram HQ just 50 km south, franchise partners in Srikakulam benefit from fast product delivery, quick query resolution, and direct access to field managers. Sub-territories in Narasannapeta, Palasa, Amadalavalasa, and Ichapuram are also available for partners who want to cover a larger footprint.

Available Franchise Sub-Territories – Srikakulam

Srikakulam Town, Narasannapeta, Palasa, Amadalavalasa, Ichapuram, Kaviti, Sompeta, Rajam

The Proximity Advantage

Crasenim Pharma's Vizianagaram HQ is just 50 km from Srikakulam. Franchise partners here get faster stock replenishment, easier access to company events, and more regular field manager visits than any distant pharma supplier can offer.

  • Less competition vs Vizag or Vijayawada markets
  • Strong rural GP and clinic-based prescription demand
  • HQ proximity means faster supply and support
  • Commission-based MR option needs zero investment
  • Growing healthcare infrastructure across all sub-mandals
FAQs

Pharma Franchise in Srikakulam – FAQ

Is a pharma franchise available in Srikakulam town?
Yes. Srikakulam town and multiple sub-territories including Narasannapeta, Palasa, Amadalavalasa, and Ichapuram are available for PCD franchise.
How close is Crasenim Pharma's HQ to Srikakulam?
Our headquarters is in Vizianagaram, approximately 50 km from Srikakulam. This means faster stock delivery, more frequent field visits, and easier communication for franchise partners based in Srikakulam.
Can I take a commission-based MR role in Srikakulam without investment?
Yes. The commission-based MR opportunity in Srikakulam requires no upfront investment. You promote our products to doctors and earn monthly commission on prescriptions generated. Contact us to discuss current sub-territory availability.
How do I apply for a pharma franchise in Srikakulam?
WhatsApp us at +91 99890 74806 with your name and preferred area, or fill the form on our Franchise page. We will call within 24 hours.

Start Your Pharma Franchise in Srikakulam

Exclusive PCD franchise and commission-based MR territories open in Srikakulam district now.
